tone_guidelines: Be honest, inclusive, and detail-oriented. Share personal experience with products. Balance aspiration with accessibility — not everyone has the same budget or skin type. Audience expects honest reviews, technique education, and product comparisons.
audience_archetype: Beauty enthusiasts across all experience levels seeking honest product reviews, technique tutorials, and skincare science education

platform_hints.youtube: Close-up application tutorials, product comparisons with swatches, GRWM with natural lighting.
platform_hints.tiktok: Quick tutorials, product dupes, 'viral product - does it work?' tests, satisfying application clips.
platform_hints.instagram: Swatch flatbys, before/after skin results, aesthetic routine reels, shelfie posts.
platform_hints.linkedin: Beauty industry trends, brand strategy analysis, ingredient science deep dives.
platform_hints.podcast: Dermatologist interviews, brand founder stories, ingredient deep dives.
platform_hints.blog: Detailed reviews with ingredient analysis, routine builders, comparison charts.
platform_hints.twitter: Product hot takes, sale alerts, ingredient debates, shelfie threads.

engagement_rules: Show before and after — real skin, real results
Include price points and budget alternatives
Be honest about products that didn't work — it builds trust
Use close-up footage for application technique
